content: Clipboard API (navigator.clipboard.writeText) reached Baseline Newly Available in March 2025, supported in all modern browsers, but requires secure context (HTTPS) and transient user activation (must be called synchronously within a user gesture handler, not after an awaited delay). execCommand('copy') is deprecated but still works in many browsers as a fallback; no specific data found on Instagram/WhatsApp in-app webview clipboard support.
